testcase.name: Initialize candidate interview pipeline successfully

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //button[contains(., 'Initialize Pipeline') or contains(text(), 'Initialize')] (tried for 25 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.25.0', revision: '8a8aea2337' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.8.0-110-generic', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 143.0.7499.40, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 143.0.7499.192 (be2c1f4fd45..., userDataDir: /tmp/.org.chromium.Chromium...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:33609}, goog:processID: 1357, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: linux, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:33609/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 143.0.7499.40, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 95692888e74ca9e83275c267723b901a

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //button[contains(., 'Initialize Pipeline') or contains(text(), 'Initialize')] (tried for 25 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.25.0', revision: '8a8aea2337' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.8.0-110-generic', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 143.0.7499.40, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 143.0.7499.192 (be2c1f4fd45..., userDataDir: /tmp/.org.chromium.Chromium...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:33609}, goog:processID: 1357, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: linux, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:33609/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 143.0.7499.40, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 95692888e74ca9e83275c267723b901a at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at com.xats.automation.tests.pages.job.JobInDetailViewPage.clickInitializePipeline(JobInDetailViewPage.java:156) at com.xats.automation.tests.stepdefinitions.job.InterviewPipelineSteps.user_clicks_on_initialize_pipeline_button(InterviewPipelineSteps.java:31) at ✽.User clicks on Initialize Pipeline button(file:///runner/_work/automation/automation/src/test/resources/features/5.pipeline/19_InterviewPipeline.feature:11)
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to the first job in Jobs list...........................passed And User expands the candidate row with Submitted status....................passed And User clicks on Initialize Pipeline button...............................failed Then User should see success toast message "Pipeline Initialized"...........skipped

testcase.name: Mark candidate as passed successfully
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to the first job in Jobs list...........................passed And User expands an initialized candidate row...............................passed And User clicks on Mark as Passed button and waits..........................passed

testcase.name: Revert candidate stage successfully
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to the first job in Jobs list...........................passed And User expands an initialized candidate row...............................passed And User clicks on Revert Stage button......................................passed Then User should see success toast message "Stage Reverted".................passed

testcase.name: Skip candidate stage successfully with feedback
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to the first job in Jobs list...........................passed And User expands an initialized candidate row...............................passed And User clicks on Skip Stage button........................................passed And User clicks Add Feedback Now, enters feedback "Candidate is ready to skip this stage", and saves.passed
